title: Crunchy Crusted Syrian Bean Stew
description: A nutty, crumbly stew made with chickpeas, lentils and a crunchy pistachio crust, perfect for a comforting sick‑day meal.

ingredients.name: pistachios
ingredients.notes: to form crunchy crust when stew cools

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat and sauté onion, garlic, carrot, and bell pepper until softened.
Stir in cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, and cayenne, cooking for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add cooked chickpeas, lentils, and vegetable broth, bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes until beans are tender.
In a small bowl, mix almond flour with a pinch of salt to create a crumbly thickening agent.
Stir the almond flour mixture into the stew, cooking for another 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
Sprinkle chopped pistachios over the top and allow the stew to cool slightly so the nuts form a crunchy crust.
Transfer the stew into a ti‑leaf wrap, seal the edges, and place the wrapped vessel in a preheated oven at 350°F for 20 minutes.
Remove from oven, open the wrap, and garnish with chopped parsley and cilantro before serving.
